reasons: Deflated Sharpe is 1.00 (>= 0.95): the edge survives correction for 9 trial(s) and non-normality.
Bootstrap P(SR<=0) is 0.00: the Sharpe stays positive across resamples (selection-blind: a cherry-picked curve can still look good here).
80% of walk-forward folds are positive: performance is reasonably stable across time (selection-blind).
PBO is 0.04 (< 0.50): the in-sample winner tends to hold up out of sample.

description: Cross-sectional momentum proxy via own-momentum z-score.
